The '''Yinchorri High Command''' was the leadership of the [[Yinchorri/Legends|Yinchorri]] [[Yinchorri warrior caste|warrior caste]], and the instigators of the [[Yinchorri Uprising]] against the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. They were headquartered in a [[Yinchorri command center|command center]] located within the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Uhanayih]]. Following the [[Battle of Uhanayih]], the Yinchorri High Command surrendered to the Republic and accepted its [[Yinchorri embargo act|sanctions]].

==Appearances==
